title: Multiple Choice
instructions: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.

questions.question: Why did the author decide to take a hearing test?

options.B: He was experiencing severe ear pain
options.C: His partner suspected he was losing his hearing
options.D: He was participating in a scientific study

questions.question: What is the most common form of hearing loss discussed in the article?
According to the WHO, what proportion of people over 65 experience some difficulty hearing?
What is one consequence of hearing loss highlighted by Julie Beadle?
What did researchers find about the relationship between hearing loss and cardiovascular disease?

options.A: Hearing loss directly causes heart disease
options.B: People with hearing loss have a lower risk of heart disease
options.C: The two conditions share several risk factors
options.D: Only severe hearing loss is associated with cardiovascular disease

questions.question: Why do some researchers question the strength of the link between hearing loss and dementia?

options.B: Dementia itself may affect hearing before diagnosis
options.C: No studies have found any association
options.D: The studies only involved young adults

questions.question: According to one theory, how might hearing loss contribute to dementia?

options.C: By creating a constant cognitive burden on the brain

questions.question: What makes the approval of Otarmeni significant?

options.A: It completely cures all forms of hearing loss
options.B: It is the first approved biological treatment restoring hearing through gene therapy
options.C: It replaces the need for cochlear implants

questions.question: What is true about the Australian gene therapy described in the article?

options.C: It is designed to improve cochlear implant performance

questions.question: What is Golub's main advice regarding hearing loss?

options.D: Get your hearing tested and do not ignore the problem
